data.title: Remove playwright-cli-spike-report.md reference from playwright-debug SKILL.md
data.description:
testing_mode: UPDATE

Extends the test file created in T1 (25b4-6971). Must be done after T1 is complete.

RED test extension (must fail before implementation):
1. Add assertion to tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh:
   - plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md does NOT contain 'playwright-cli-spike-report.md'
   - git grep for 'plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive' in plugins/dso/agents/ and plugins/dso/skills/ returns zero matches (no legacy path refs)
2. Run the test — the new assertion must FAIL (RED) because the sentence still exists

GREEN implementation:
3. Remove the sentence from plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md:
   'For CLI command patterns and session management, see the spike report at docs/designs/playwright-cli-spike-report.md.'
4. Run the test — all assertions must PASS (GREEN)

Note: The sentence to remove is approximately at line 468 of playwright-debug/SKILL.md, in the ## Reference section. Remove the entire paragraph (sentence + surrounding blank lines if orphaned).

Acceptance criteria:
- [ ] plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md has no 'playwright-cli-spike-report.md' reference
  Verify: grep -c 'playwright-cli-spike-report' plugins/dso/skills/playwright-debug/SKILL.md; echo "exit $?"
- [ ] git grep for banned legacy paths returns zero in agents/ and skills/
  Verify: git grep -rl 'plugins/dso/docs/designs\|plugins/dso/docs/findings\|plugins/dso/docs/archive' plugins/dso/agents/ plugins/dso/skills/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
- [ ] test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh passes all assertions
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh
